summary: Tested 4 incident ticket connectivity fixes: (1) Audit Center Transfer Variances tab, (2) Backend API, (3) Incident Tickets transfer links, (4) Branch Transfers ticket badge, (5) Dispute History Timeline. All 5 features PASSED. Fixed 1 backend bug in check_perm function.

fixed.issue: check_perm() was called with 2 arguments instead of 3 (missing 'action' param)
fixed.fix: Changed 'await check_perm(user, "reports.view")' to 'check_perm(user, "reports", "view")' in routes/audit.py line 1331

details.variance_list: Shows 4 variance items with incident ticket badges (INC-00001, INC-00002)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing variance data from previous tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Incident ticket connectivity features are fully working. Transfer Variances tab in Audit Center shows all transfers with has_shortage/has_excess flags. Bidirectional links between transfers and tickets work correctly - ticket badges in Branch Transfers navigate to /incident-tickets, and transfer links in Incident Tickets point back to /branch-transfers. Dispute History Timeline shows colored timeline dots with events (counted, disputed, re-counted, accepted).

verification_notes.data_exists: Test database has 4 received transfers with variances (2 with incident tickets INC-00001, INC-00002)
verification_notes.backend_fix: Changed check_perm(user, 'reports.view') to check_perm(user, 'reports', 'view') - the function requires 3 arguments
verification_notes.timeline_rendering: Dispute History Timeline is an IIFE that builds events from transfer fields: pending_receipt_at, disputed_at, accepted_at, etc.
